items.signal: pipeline run summary reports status blocked during scan
items.impact: apply stage is skipped and target state is unchanged

items.signal: journey marks update or scan as pending after recent source changes
items.impact: trust posture is provisional until evidence is refreshed
items.fixCommand: pnpm tsx src/cli.ts scan --format json && pnpm tsx src/cli.ts journey

items.signal: quality:evidence:verify reports missing or stale report artifacts
items.impact: release checks cannot be considered complete

items.signal: apply output shows planned changes despite expected convergence
items.impact: tool target directories may be out of sync with lockfile
items.fixCommand: pnpm tsx src/cli.ts apply --target all --scope project --mode copy --json
items.verifyCommand: pnpm tsx src/cli.ts apply --target all --scope project --mode copy --dry-run --json
